items.title: 007 First Light’s developer lays off staff but claims its next franchise will continue
items.summary: IO Interactive, the studio behind the Hitman series and 007 First Light, announced that it is laying off staff after a relationship with an "external partner" on its next big fr...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Nvidia competitor Etched hits $5B valuation, $1B in sales for AI chip
items.summary: Nvidia AI chip competitor Etched says it has already booked $1 billion under contract for the inference systems powered by its chip.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Maithri Aquatech draws DP World's backing in a sign of Indian climate tech coming of age
items.summary: Hyderabad startup Maithri Aquatech, whose Meghdoot technology makes drinking water from air, has secured a strategic stake from DP World, a marker of maturing Indian climate tech.
